title: Deployment Environments, OIDC, Workload Identity, and Cloud Authority · CI/CD Retrieval
summary: An operations handoff reconstructs deployment environments, oidc, workload identity, and cloud authority from delayed run evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the environment and federated identity policy under changed load. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for environment and federated identity policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use named environments for approvals, branch and tag policies, scoped secrets, wait rules, URL evidence, and deployment history.
Request id-token write only in the deployment job and validate issuer, audience, subject, workflow ref, repository identity, event, and environment claims.
Exchange GitHub OIDC identity through a constrained Google Workload Identity Provider and service account without storing a key.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Ci Environment Protection Secret Scope · changed case · Review Ci Environment Protection Secret Sco…
steps.instruction:
review case — A review deployment stores a long-lived cloud key, requests broad id-token and repository permissions, and trusts ambiguous OIDC claims. Constrain environment, audience, subject, workflow, revision, service account, approval, and audit evidence.

Which action demonstrates Ci Environment Protection Secret Scope without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Ci Environment Protection Secret Scope · changed case · Review Ci Environment Protection Secret Sco….
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use named environments for approvals, branch and tag policies, scoped secrets, wait rules, url evidence, and deployment history. For Ci Environment Protection Secret Scope · changed case · Review Ci Environment Protection Secret Sco…, keep Ci Environment Protection Secret Scope connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.
